title: chore: remove infra and scripts directories
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Removes the `infra/` directory and its CloudFront files.
- Removes the `scripts/` directory and its Cloudflare account helper.
- Keeps the change limited to the requested directory cleanup.

Validation:
- `git diff --check`
- Confirmed both directories are absent after deletion

gist.headline: Spring cleaning the hive
gist.blurb: We did a little spring cleaning and swept out some old infrastructure and script directories that were no longer needed.
gist.summary: Removed the deprecated `infra/` and `scripts/` directories, including old CloudFront and Cloudflare helper files.
gist.impact: This cleans up the repository by removing unused deployment and account management scripts.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee doing some spring cleaning, sweeping up old floppy disks or papers (representing scripts/infra) into a dustpan. The Nomnom creature can be helping by eating the old documents.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny bandana, sweeping up old floppy disks and paper scripts with a tiny broom. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats the old documents. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny bandana, sweeping up old floppy disks and paper scripts with a tiny broom. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats the old documents. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
